name: workflows
description: Durable named JavaScript workflows for one systemd/Btrfs Linux host.

scripts.typecheck:interfaces: tsc --ignoreConfig --allowJs --checkJs --noEmit --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --skipLibCheck workflow-api-v16.d.ts tests/interfaces/*.ts tests/interfaces/*.flow.js
scripts.typecheck:flows: tsc --ignoreConfig --allowJs --checkJs --noEmit --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict false --skipLibCheck workflow-api-v16.d.ts src/builtins/*.flow.js
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:conformance:v17
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:interfaces && npm run typecheck:flows && npm run typecheck:conformance:v17 && npm test
